channel.title: Voices from X
channel.description: Selected long-form posts and articles from the X community.
channel.itunes:author: Daniel Cazzulino
channel.itunes:subtitle: Voices from X
channel.itunes:summary: Selected long-form posts and articles from the X community.

item.title: Hope: The Future Is Bright
item.description: Brivael Le Pogam, YC-backed CTO of Argil, makes the case for techno-optimism: builders who act without permission, the French system's hostility to enterprise, and why AI multiplies human capacity rather than rationing the future.
item.itunes:summary: Brivael Le Pogam, YC-backed CTO of Argil, makes the case for techno-optimism: builders who act without permission, the French system's hostility to enterprise, and why AI multiplies human capacity rather than rationing the future.

item.title: SpaceX: Not an IPO — It's a Referendum
item.description: Brivael Le Pogam describes the abnormal retail rush for SpaceX shares. It's not investing or speculation — ordinary people are voting with their money for the camp of builders and makers over the gray bureaucracy of control and permission.
item.itunes:summary: Brivael Le Pogam describes the abnormal retail rush for SpaceX shares. It's not investing or speculation — ordinary people are voting with their money for the camp of builders and makers over the gray bureaucracy of control and permission.
